title: PDF generation does not work
one_liner: Frontend PDF export button does nothing; reporter linked PR #1720 with a fix, so review/merge that PR.

title: Security Vulnerability Report - Awaiting Acknowledgment
one_liner: Researcher asks for a private disclosure channel; enable GitHub private vulnerability reporting and add SECURITY.md (none exists today).

title: [Feature Request] Add research quality scoring and source reliability ranking
one_liner: Large enhancement to score sources and findings (authority, cross-referencing, confidence intervals); needs Assaf's roadmap decision.

title: Verifiable research audit trail — signed receipts for agent actions
one_liner: Promotion of the 'protect-mcp' / veritasacta signed-receipt product framed as a feature; close as out-of-scope promo.

title: Your MCP server earned an A security grade on Loaditout
one_liner: Loaditout badge solicitation; close as promotional, no action needed.

title: Trust layer for autonomous research sources?
one_liner: Thread of competing third-party 'trust score' / smsh / PCH / joy-connect promos; close as spam/promo.

title: Add AgentWeb — free business data API for agents
one_liner: AgentWeb product promotion; close as promo.

title: Proposal: Enabling agent monetization and commerce via Merxex
one_liner: Merxex agent-commerce promotion (one of several duplicates); close as promo.

title: Merxex Integration: Enabling Agent-to-Agent Commerce
one_liner: Duplicate Merxex promo (see #1736/#1745/#1747); close.

title: Proposal: Enabling Agent-to-Agent Commerce via Merxex
one_liner: Duplicate Merxex promo (verbatim copy of #1736); close.

title: Standardizing Agent Commerce: Merxex Integration Proposal
one_liner: Duplicate Merxex promo; close.

title: Provider suggestion: SerpBase for lower-cost SERP access
one_liner: Vendor self-promoting SerpBase as a SERP retriever (with sockpuppet comment); close as promo unless Assaf wants a community PR.

title: SECURITY INQUIRY
one_liner: Request to add SECURITY.md and enable GitHub vuln reporting; add the file (overlaps #1719).

title: Research gets stuck with no meaningful logs/UI hints
one_liner: Research hangs intermittently with local SearXNG+Ollama and no timeout/retry feedback; likely missing timeouts on external LLM/search calls — needs repro details and could lead to adding timeout/retry+logging.

title: Language not supported well (Vietnamese output stays English)
one_liner: Report output ignores input language (Vietnamese) and defaults to English; needs language/locale handling in prompts/config.

title: Feature: JSON constrained output for Deep Research query extraction
one_liner: Deep Research uses fragile startswith('Query:'/'Learning'/'Question:') parsing (confirmed in deep_research.py) causing 0 queries on some models; switch to JSON-constrained output + json_repair like query_processing.py.

title: Independent trust comparison data available for GPT Researcher
one_liner: HVTracker ranking/badge promotion; close as promo.

title: [Security] Unauthenticated Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)
one_liner: Confirmed: source_urls/document_urls from unauthenticated /ws reach scrapers with no URL validation, enabling SSRF to internal hosts/metadata; add scheme allowlist + private-IP/metadata blocklist before session.get.

title: Feature: Add persistent behavioral memory via Agent Magnet integration
one_liner: Agent Magnet / Universal Memory Protocol cross-promo thread; close as promo.

title: Add Obscura as a scraper backend
one_liner: Plausible community contribution adding an Obscura (Rust headless) scraper backend with a PR ready; Assaf to decide whether to accept the new dependency/backend.

title: Runtime Open Federation — federate GPT-Researcher, earn USDC
one_liner: Crypto/USDC federation node promotion (multilingual spam); close as promo.

title: Unauthenticated arbitrary local PDF file read via source_urls
one_liner: Related to SSRF #1794: bare local paths ending in .pdf route to PyMuPDFScraper local-file branch enabling arbitrary local PDF read; fix by validating URL scheme/rejecting local paths in the source_urls path.

title: Website is broken (gptr.dev/#features client-side exception)
one_liner: Marketing site gptr.dev #features crashes with a Next.js client-side exception; lives in a separate website repo, route to whoever owns gptr.dev.

title: Integration idea: BGPT evidence retrieval tool
one_liner: BGPT literature-evidence MCP/API promotion; close as promo.

title: Dependency hardening: pin minimum safe dependency versions
one_liner: Low-priority hygiene: pin brotli>=1.2.0 (and similar) to avoid downgrading into known CVEs; small requirements/pyproject change.
